summary: Completed comprehensive security testing for TLS PDF Stamping application. Tested rate limiting, security headers, CORS, password reset functionality, and password change endpoint. Found several critical security issues requiring immediate attention.

critical_bugs.issue: CORS allows all origins (*) - major security vulnerability
critical_bugs.impact: Allows malicious sites to make requests to the API

critical_bugs.issue: Rate limiting not working - should limit to 5 requests/minute but doesn't
critical_bugs.impact: Allows brute force attacks on login endpoint

passed_tests: Default admin force_password_reset flag working correctly
Password reset modal appears and functions properly
Password change endpoint rejects incorrect current passwords
SECRET_KEY configuration working - JWT validation functional
Security headers partially working (X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, CSP present)
Password reset modal has proper validation requirements and security messaging
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix CORS configuration to not allow all origins (*). Fix rate limiting on auth endpoints. Add Strict-Transport-Security header to security middleware. The CORS issue is a major security vulnerability that needs immediate attention.
